name: 2026-06-03 Political Commentary Arraignment Reset TH
description:
Arrested Monday. Arraignment reset to Thursday.

After the senator's counsel filed a motion to dismiss the case or remand it to the Ombudsman, the Sandiganbayan deferred the arraignment to June 4.

Iba ang hustisya pag may pera.

Ordinary Filipinos do not get a defense team filing motions before the cell door closes.

The arrest is real. The speed is not for everyone.

Arrested Monday. Arraignment reset to Thursday.

After the senator's counsel filed a motion to dismiss the case or remand it to the Ombudsman, the Sandiganbayan deferred the arraignment to June 4.

Iba ang hustisya pag may pera.

Ordinary Filipinos do not get a defense team filing motions before the cell door closes.

The arrest is real. The speed is not for everyone.

Sandiganbayan 2nd Division on 2026-06-02 deferred to 2026-06-04 the graft arraignment of a sitting senator (and former DPWH Secretary) arrested 2026-06-01 for plunder linked to alleged P573M in flood control kickbacks. Deferment was granted to let prosecution respond to defense's omnibus motion seeking dismissal or remand to the Office of the Ombudsman for reinvestigation.
